source_pr.title: gc_woker: start safePointChecker before run worker.
source_pr.body: If tidb is not able to finish bootstrap in 100 seconds, the safePointChecker will not be started, then all transactions are not able to execute.

symptoms: wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
failure_signature: wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR changes GC safepoint checker startup/teardown behavior (start the checker earlier and adjust store close signaling). While it improves runtime robustness, the patch does not clearly indicate a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent/flaky test failure, and the evidence string is not a concrete flaky failure signature. We conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
